name: Bench Press
description: Lay on bench and press barbell up

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Press dumbbells on an inclined bench

name: Deadlift
description: Lift barbell from floor to hip height

name: Pull Ups
description: Pull yourself up on a bar

name: Bent Over Row
description: Hinge forward and pull barbell to stomach

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold kettlebell at chest and squat

name: Overhead Press
description: Press barbell from chest to over head

name: Lateral Raises
description: Lift dumbbells out to the sides

name: Tricep Dips
description: Lower and raise body using bench or bars
